summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). All new features verified: Settings page (email config, backup/restore), email_filter on accounts, PWA manifest/service-worker, 7 nav items in sidebar, Export Backup on Dashboard, AI Categorize on Transactions.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Login page renders with Google sign-in button at /login
Google login button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com (correct URL format)
All API endpoints return 401 without auth
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
Settings page renders with Email Auto-Scan and Backup sections
Settings page shows in sidebar navigation (7th nav item)
POST /api/email-config saves email configuration
GET /api/email-config returns configured status
POST /api/email-scan returns proper error when no account email filters set
GET /api/backup/export returns accounts, transactions, categories
POST /api/backup/import handles empty import correctly
POST /api/backup/import with real data restores correctly
Accounts page shows email_filter field in create/edit form
Account creation with email_filter saves correctly
Account cards show email filter badge when configured
Dashboard has Export Backup button
Transactions page has AI Categorize button
PWA manifest.json is accessible at /manifest.json
Service worker is accessible at /service-worker.js
All 7 nav items show in sidebar (Dashboard, Accounts, Transactions, Upload, Analytics, Categories, Settings)
POST /api/accounts - create account with email_filter field
GET /api/categories returns 10 default categories
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent missing aria-describedby for accessibility (console warning)
seed_data_creation: Test account 'Test Email Filter Account' created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 4 are working: Settings page with email config and backup/restore, email_filter field on accounts with badge display, PWA manifest and service worker accessible, 7 nav items in sidebar. Email scan will fail in test environment (no real IMAP server) but returns proper validation errors. Test user has 292 transactions from HDFC bank PDF upload.
